title: The First 'Alawite Rebellion in al-Bagah
description: In the middle of Shawwil of the year 255 (September io-October 8, 869) a man who claimed to be cAli b. Muhammad b. Abmad b. cAli b. `isi b. Zayd b. -Ali b. al-Husayn b. cAli b. AbI TOW'S appeared in Furst al-Ba$rah."6 He assembled his forces from among the Zanj,'" i t t. See Tabari, III, t 6o5. t i i. The lbrkish commander, killed in 253/867, he was the father of $ilih. See Tabari, III, 1687. 113. In the vicinity of Simarri. See Yiqut, Mu'jam al-bulddn, III, 174 # Ya`qubi, Kitdb al-bulddn.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 36
